CustomField.label: Message When It Can't Run
CustomField.description: Optional. Replaces the default message users see when a check can't be evaluated (for example, a bad query or formula). Keep it user-friendly — never include SOQL, errors, or technical details. Press Enter to start a new line; each line is shown as a separate line on the card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. Friendly text shown when the check can't run. Do not include technical details. Press Enter for a new line.
